cards.title: 전날 AI 뉴스 핵심 요약
cards.summary: 웹에서 보안, 모델, 오픈소스 관련 AI 이슈가 포착됐습니다. 아래 3개 항목을 우선 확인하면 됩니다.
bullets: Hack the AI agent: Build agentic AI security skills with the GitHub Secure Code Game
OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
cards.aria_line: GPT 자동 호출 없이 웹에서 잡힌 흐름만 골랐어요. 제목은 원문 기준이에요.
cards.caption: AI 뉴스 아리아 안전 모드

items.title: Hack the AI agent: Build agentic AI security skills with the GitHub Secure Code Game
items.summary: Learn to find and exploit real-world agentic AI vulnerabilities through five progressive challenges in this free, open source game that over 10,000 developers have already used to sharpen their security skills. The post

items.title: Our commitment to community safety
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI protects community safety in ChatGPT through model safeguards, misuse detection, policy enforcement, and collaboration with safety experts.

items.title: OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
items.summary: OpenAI GPT models, Codex, and Managed Agents are now available on AWS, enabling enterprises to build secure AI in their AWS environments.
